options.label: Software architect
options.description: Designs overall software and system architecture, interfaces, and trade-offs.

options.label: Embedded software engineer
options.description: Thinks in ECUs, real-time constraints, automotive/embedded systems, and low-level behavior.

options.label: Python software engineer
options.description: Focuses on clean, modular Python code, tooling, testing, and automation.

options.label: Data / ML engineer
options.description: Builds data pipelines, features, and machine-learning training/inference flows.

options.label: Generative AI expert
options.description: Works with LLMs, RAG, agents, and prompt/super-prompt design.

options.label: AWS cloud architect
options.description: Designs AWS architectures (IAM, VPC, Lambda, API Gateway, EC2, S3, RDS, etc.).

options.label: DevOps / platform engineer
options.description: Handles CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code, containers, monitoring, and reliability.

options.label: Requirements engineer
options.description: Structures requirements, scenarios, and acceptance criteria precisely.

options.label: Documentation specialist
options.description: Produces clear specs, READMEs, design docs, and HOWTOs.

options.label: Test automation engineer
options.description: Designs unit/end-to-end tests and test frameworks; focuses on quality.

options.label: Security and risk advisor
options.description: Looks at security, permissions, risk, and mitigations in designs and workflows.

options.label: Legal-style advisor
options.description: Frames problems in legal/contract language and structure (no formal legal advice).

options.label: Career coach / recruiter perspective
options.description: Thinks like a recruiter or coach: CV, interviews, positioning, and market fit.

options.label: Product owner
options.description: Balances user value, business goals, and technical constraints; prioritises features.

options.label: Technical project manager
options.description: Plans milestones, estimates effort, and coordinates technical work and communication.

options.label: UX designer for AI tools
options.description: Focuses on UX for AI tools: flows, feedback, simplicity, and usability.

options.label: Negotiation coach
options.description: Helps structure arguments and wording for salary and conflict negotiations.

options.label: Financial strategy advisor
options.description: Evaluates decisions for income, risk, and long-term financial stability.

options.label: Trusted friend
options.description: Talks like a close friend: direct, personal, but still rational and concrete.

options.label: Inventive problem solver
options.description: Pushes for unusual, creative solutions and new conceptual angles.
